text: <par>The first syllable <latinform>ʁua⁵⁵</latinform> may be descended from etymon 213 *r-gyap, but note that <latinform>dʑo³³lɑ³⁵</latinform> 'back' (182646) has the first syllable tagged 213. Cf. also 193152, which is the same Shixing form.</par>
<par>As the gloss of this compound indicates, pork is generally regarded as the unmarked or typical meat in the Tibeto-Burman area.</par>
